svg.text: Identification is benchmarked on REAL BMRB experimental ¹H peak lists (true intensities, multiplets, noise) and on

svg.text: INDEPENDENT GISSMO shifts the model never trained on. The hybrid is the best precision-respecting method on this real

svg.text: No data leakage (ถูกต้อง)

text.font-family: -apple-system, 'Helvetica Neue', Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Feature selection happens inside every CV fold; we report the honest AUC AND the leaky AUC side-by-side so the inflation

text.font-family: -apple-system, 'Helvetica Neue', Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: gap is visible. On real cohorts leaky ≤ honest — zero optimism.

svg.text: Reproducible (น่าเชื่อถือ)

text.font-family: -apple-system, 'Helvetica Neue', Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Fixed random seeds throughout, a pinned dependency lockfile, 111 passing tests over the statistics, and provenance

text.font-family: -apple-system, 'Helvetica Neue', Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: recorded per run — re-run and the numbers land the same.

svg.text: HOW WE GET THE ANSWER

text.font-family: -apple-system, 'Helvetica Neue', Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Each guard targets a different way to be wrong: real-data accuracy (แม่นยำ), no-cheating

text.font-family: -apple-system, 'Helvetica Neue', Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: validation with honest numbers (ถูกต้อง), and reproducibility + provenance (น่าเชื่อถือ).

text.font-family: -apple-system, 'Helvetica Neue', Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Convergent validity — re-discovering published biomarkers — is the strongest external check.

text.font-family: -apple-system, 'Helvetica Neue', Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Grounded in: Sandve 2013 (reproducibility) · Bengio & Grandvalet 2004 (CV-variance caveat) · Elias & Gygi 2007
